title: Team Cure
description: Makes villager cure discounts transfer onto other members of the team
body:
**Requires owo-lib**
---

Makes villager cure discounts also apply to other players.

There are two modes, team and everyone (same name in config) in team mode it applies the discount to everyone that is in the same team the player was in when they cured the villager. In everyone mode it applies the discount to all players.

This mod adds the equivalent of the major_discount to other players and ingores minor_discount so the player who cures the villager still has more discount, but not that much.

Config Example

```json5
{
	"dissableMod": false,
	"mode": "team"
}
```
